    "Uninsulated suction line on the refrigerant line set"

    "Install elastomeric closed-cell insulation along the entire length of the suction line",
    "Ensure all joints in the insulation are sealed and taped to prevent condensation"

  "rationale": "The suction line of the refrigerant line set is uninsulated at the rough-complete stage. This violates energy codes and manufacturer installation specifications, as uninsulated suction lines lead to thermal loss, condensation, and potential water damage to surrounding building components.",
